<!-- Playwright Project Instructions -->

This is a Playwright testing project configured for end-to-end testing across multiple browsers.

## Key Information

- **Primary Language:** JavaScript
- **Framework:** Playwright
- **Entry Point:** Tests in `tests/` directory
- **Configuration:** `playwright.config.js`

## Common Commands

- `npm install` - Install dependencies
- `npm test` - Run all tests
- `npm run test:headed` - Run tests with browser visible
- `npm run test:ui` - Run tests with Playwright Inspector UI
- `npm run test:debug` - Debug tests interactively

## Project Structure

- `tests/` - Test files (*.spec.js)
- `playwright.config.js` - Test configuration
- `package.json` - Dependencies and scripts
- README.md - Full documentation

When working with this project, refer to the official [Playwright documentation](https://playwright.dev) for best practices and API references.
